---
title: "Homepage"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
author:
  - "Aleksandar Neshov"
  - "Dinh Marcus Nguyen"
  - "Alexander Toropov"
date: today
---

## About the project

This website documents our StatProg2 group project. We use tourism data from Munich to explore patterns, trends, and insights in a clear and reproducible way.

## Pages

- [Proposal](pages/proposal.qmd): project motivation, research question, and planned analysis.
- [Analysis](pages/analysis.qmd):
- [Group Reflection](pages/group_reflection.qmd): a structured reflection on our dataset, analytical choices, collaboration, and skill development during the project.
- [Contributing](pages/contributing.qmd):

## Data

Our project uses the Munich open data tourism dataset:

- [Monatszahlen Tourismus](https://opendata.muenchen.de/dataset/monatszahlen-tourismus)

## Goal

The aim of the website is to present the project as a small **data story**: what question we ask, how we analyze the data, what we find and why the results matter.
